perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a checkered cap, wearing a green polo shirt, speaks directly to the camera with active hand gestures. (2) The screen transitions to a music player interface showing the song 'Dust on the Wind' by 'The Velvet Sundown' with scrolling lyrics over a sunset background. (3) The man returns to the frame, explaining the origin of the band while icons for Spotify and AI-generated content appear around him. (4) A brief clip of a rock band in silhouette against a smoky blue light is shown. (5) The man continues his explanation, accompanied by various graphic overlays: a 'verified' stamp, music note icons, a 'thief' cartoon sticker, and a red 'X' mark. (6) The video concludes with the man pointing his finger toward the camera as if asking a question.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged male voice speaks with an enthusiastic and steady tone. (2) A rock song begins, featuring deep male vocals, distorted electric guitar, and steady drums. (3) The song fades out as the male narrator resumes his fast-paced, informative speech. (4) Occasional subtle sound effects accompany the appearance of on-screen graphics, while the main audio remains the narrator's voice with minimal ambient studio noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你聽過這首 Spotify 上爆紅的歌嗎' - Hook asking if the viewer has heard a viral song. (2) 'The Velvet Sundown - Dust on the Wind' - Functional text identifying the song and artist. (3) '出自 AI 之手！' - Hook highlighting that the music was made by AI. (4) '音樂、歌詞、甚至於視覺內容都是由 AI 所生成的' - Functional description explaining all content is AI-generated. (5) '未經同意' - Hook emphasizing lack of consent. (6) '是對原創音樂的盜竊' - Hook labeling the act as theft of original music. (7) '那你怎麼認為呢？' - Functional call to action asking for viewer opinions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Song Demonstration -> Revelation of AI Origin -> Ethical Discussion -> Outro/Question

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator (3c Tim) on screen throughout most of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian man with short hair, wearing a green polo shirt, a tan/orange/white checkered newsboy cap, and thick-rimmed glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred indoor domestic setting with a neutral-colored wall and a glimpse of a grey curtain.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Investigation -> Controversy -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform the audience about a specific viral band on Spotify that was discovered to be entirely AI-generated. It explores the controversy surrounding AI mimicking real artists without consent and questions whether such content constitutes music 'theft' or a lack of soul, ultimately seeking viewer engagement on the ethics of AI in the creative industry.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a commentary piece; though brands like Spotify are mentioned, it is for topical context rather than promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator uses a distinctive checkered cap and '3ctim' branding icons in the top corners.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The high density of variety-show style stickers and text overlays suggests this is targeted at a social media audience (like Reels or TikTok) used to fast-paced information delivery.
